'''fafate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yore|yore]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-f-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yore|yore]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fafate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:fafate|fafate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fafatesher|fafatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafatesherĂ«m|fafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafatero|fafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fafateshĂ«|fafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafateshĂ«m|fafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafatero|gokifafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifafateshĂ«|gokifafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafateshĂ«m|gokifafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofafankerom|gofafankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofafankeshĂ«|gofafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofafankeshĂ«m|gofafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofafankeya|gofafankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafaterom|fafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafatemu|fafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fafateya|fafateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafaterom|gokifafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafatemu|gokifafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifafateya|gokifafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:fafafate|fafafate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fafafatesher|fafafatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafafatesherĂ«m|fafafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafafatero|fafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fafafateshĂ«|fafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafafateshĂ«m|fafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafafatero|gokifafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifafafateshĂ«|gokifafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafafateshĂ«m|gokifafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofafafankerom|gofafafankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofafafankeshĂ«|gofafafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofafafankeshĂ«m|gofafafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofafafankeya|gofafafankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafafaterom|fafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafafatemu|fafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fafafateya|fafafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafafaterom|gokifafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafafatemu|gokifafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifafafateya|gokifafafateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:fĂŠfĂŠte|fĂŠfĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fĂŠfĂŠtesher|fĂŠfĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m|fĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠfĂŠtero|fĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|fĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|fĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifĂŠfĂŠtero|gokifĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|gokifĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|gokifĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofĂŠfĂŠnkerom|gofĂŠfĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«|gofĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gofĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofĂŠfĂŠnkeya|gofĂŠfĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠfĂŠterom|fĂŠfĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠfĂŠtemu|fĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fĂŠfĂŠteya|fĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifĂŠfĂŠterom|gokifĂŠfĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠfĂŠtemu|gokifĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifĂŠfĂŠteya|gokifĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:fafafte|fafafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fafaftesher|fafaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafaftesherĂ«m|fafaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafaftero|fafaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fafafteshĂ«|fafafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafafteshĂ«m|fafafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafaftero|gokifafaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifafafteshĂ«|gokifafafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafafteshĂ«m|gokifafafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofafafnkerom|gofafafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofafafnkeshĂ«|gofafafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofafafnkeshĂ«m|gofafafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofafafnkeya|gofafafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafafterom|fafafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafaftemu|fafaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fafafteya|fafafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafafterom|gokifafafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafaftemu|gokifafaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifafafteya|gokifafafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
